On this page

Developers ​

Essential tools, learning resources, and hosting services for developers

Development Tools & Platforms ​

  • VS Code - code editor with extension

  • Hugo, Astro, VitePress – static site generators

Learning Resources ​

  • Odin Project - learn web dev
  • freeCourseSite – Free courses

Domain & Hosting Services ​

  • UA Hosting - (🚧 down currently)

  • Cloudflare Domains - domain pricing

  • Regery – Domain registrar & hosting

  • 20i Domains – Domain registration
